'''Forscan VI''' was a colony [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Auril sector/Legends|Auril sector]], on the edge of the [[Cron Drift/Legends|Cron Drift]]. During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] it had been neutral, but in [[21 BBY/Legends|21 BBY]] elite [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] agents had established a training camp on the world and disturbed the settlers. The settlers complained to the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]], who [[Mission to Forscan VI|dispatched]] [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] to the planet in [[20 BBY/Legends|20 BBY]] to covertly aide the settlers, without letting either side know the Jedi were present. Before they could finish however, they were summoned back to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] for an emergency.
